notes: New "Check for Updates" link (blue text) under the app version number in Settings — tap it to check right now instead of waiting for the automatic background check. It tells you either way: up to date, an update is ready to install, or the check couldn't complete.

Fixed the What's New, Update Available, and changelog history windows not closing on back-swipe or the hardware/gesture back button — they only closed via their X button or tapping outside. Back now closes whichever of these is open first, before anything else.
